name: Spiced Tomato Sunset
recipeIngredient: 1 large can V-8 or tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir well until everything is mixed together.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve hot in mugs or cold over ice.
May be served hot in mugs or cold over ice. Serves 8.
Per serving: 29 cal; 0.8 g prot; 0 fat; 7 g carb; 0 chol; 59 mg sod; 1 g fiber; vegan
